svg.title: LendIQ high-level design with all five routes
svg.desc: User request flows through FastAPI to a LangGraph router which dispatches to one of five specialists: SQL agent, RAG agent, locate workflow, briefing generator, and safe reject. The first three are grounded in SQLite, ChromaDB, and a rules engine. All five feed a common return path carrying answer, sources, and approval flag, then audit log and response.
